text:

----

^Triage, for this bug report

Re: <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_activity.cgi?id=258238>, mm@ will have lost sight of changes to this BR, so I'm flagging him for feedback with regard to the PR. 

@jbo if you prefer, make mm@ a CC recipient instead. 

----

Generally, for the future, a gentle hint: 

* wherever a review in Phabricator will relate to a bug report in Bugzilla 
  (and/or an issue or MR or PR in GitLab, GitHub or Codeberg), please 
  make followers aware reasonably soon after review begins, certainly 
  before completion of the review. 

Thanks

:-)
